title: PPIP - Login from settings - Share Data toggle disappears
scenario: Share Data toggle disappears from App Settings > General > Account after logging in with Poly credentials
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app fresh (clear app data or reinstall).
3. On the onboarding screen, tap "Continue as Guest".
4. Choose either "Share" or "Don't Share" option for data sharing.
5. Navigate to App Settings → General → Account.
6. Verify the "Share Data" toggle is visible.
7. Tap "Log in" and log in with valid Poly credentials.
8. Observe the Account screen after successful login.
expected: The "Share Data" toggle should remain visible in App Settings > General > Account after logging in with Poly credentials.
